task_completion.description: Create a 3-circle Venn diagram in EdrawMax
task_completion.visual_evidence: EdrawMax application window is open and a Venn diagram with 3 intersecting circles is visible on the canvas.

task_completion.description: Add the title 'Cloud Service Models Comparison'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Cloud Service Models Comparison' is visible on the canvas, typically positioned at the top as a title.

task_completion.description: Label the three main circles 'IaaS', 'PaaS', and 'SaaS'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The three main circles contain the text labels 'IaaS', 'PaaS', and 'SaaS'.

task_completion.description: Include specific text in the unique regions of each circle
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Virtual Machines' is inside the IaaS circle's non-overlapping area, 'App Engine' is inside the PaaS circle's non-overlapping area, and 'Office Suite' is inside the SaaS circle's non-overlapping area.

task_completion.description: Place 'Scalability' in the center region where all three circles overlap
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Scalability' is located in the exact center intersection where all three circles overlap.

task_completion.description: Ensure the circles use transparent fill colors
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fill colors of the circles are transparent or semi-transparent, allowing the overlapping regions to visually blend colors or show the background underneath.

task_completion.description: Save the final diagram as cloud_services_venn.eddx
task_completion.visual_evidence: The EdrawMax window title bar shows 'cloud_services_venn' or a save dialog shows the file being saved to the Documents folder as 'cloud_services_venn.eddx'.

integrity.description: Agent used the EdrawMax GUI to create the diagram
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with EdrawMax menus, toolbars, or shape libraries rather than just executing terminal commands to generate the file.

integrity.description: Agent created genuine text elements rather than pasting an image
integrity.visual_evidence: The text labels and circles appear as individual editable elements within the EdrawMax canvas, not as a single pasted static image from a web browser.
The application interface clearly belongs to EdrawMax (look for EdrawMax branding, specific ribbon UI, or window title).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output file path is /home/ga/Documents/cloud_services_venn.eddx. The diagram must contain the exact strings: 'Cloud Service Models Comparison', 'IaaS', 'PaaS', 'SaaS', 'Virtual Machines', 'App Engine', 'Office Suite', and 'Scalability'.
